mechanism: The Kalecki profit floor supports corporate earnings and thus sustains hedge financing for IG corporates. As the channel erodes (deficit composition shifting to interest payments with lower MPC), the profit floor weakens, potentially accelerating the corporate sector's drift from hedge toward speculative/Ponzi financing.
regime_dependence: The reflexivity is strongest when corporate leverage is elevated and profit margins are dependent on fiscal transfers. Household sector remains insulated via mortgage rate lock-in regardless of Kalecki dynamics.
